chat_tagline: Your local AI system. Chat means action.
chat_empty_hero: What would you like to do today?
chat_ws_disconnected: Error: WebSocket is not connected. Check whether the service is running.
chat_error_missing_settings: No model is configured yet. Open Settings and fill in the provider, model name, and API key before sending messages.
chat_attachment_default_prompt: Please read the attachments first and summarize the key points.
chat_upload_limit: You can add up to 10 files
chat_hint_app_desc: Describe what you need and AI writes the app
chat_hint_app_text: Build me a travel checklist app
chat_hint_shell_desc: Run shell operations on this machine
chat_hint_file_desc: Upload attachments for AI to analyze or transform
chat_hint_file_text: I want to upload a file for analysis
chat_hint_task_desc: Schedule AI to run tasks regularly
chat_hint_task_text: Create a daily morning news summary task
